strings: Mewls pitifully for milk
Tries to figure out all of the smells around {PRONOUN/m_c/object}
Snoozes peacefully
Tries to open {PRONOUN/m_c/poss} eyes, but it's all blurry
Head empty
Almost rolled out of the nest
Tried suckling on a piece of bedding
Is squealing loudly
Mewls at someone nudging {PRONOUN/m_c/object}
Hisses at all the strange new smells
Mewls for attention
Puffs {PRONOUN/m_c/poss} fur out at a new smell
Snuggles closer to r_c
Snuggles up to the belly of r_c
Smells r_c and immediately perks up
Mews at r_c as {PRONOUN/r_c/subject} {VERB/r_c/shift/shifts} in the nest
Squeaks pitifully as r_c checks on {PRONOUN/m_c/object}
Nuzzles up to r_c with a purr
Squeaks pitifully as r_c grooms {PRONOUN/m_c/object}
Purrs while suckling milk
Squeals when r_c gets out of the nest
Tried suckling on r_c's tail
Is being buried under r_c
Was almost shoved out of the nest by r_c
